baslik: Komekami! Girls TV Anime Önemli Görsel, Fragman, Oyuncular ve 2 Nisan Çıkış Tarihini Açıkladı
ozet: Komekami için önemli bir görsel, fragman ve seslendirme kadrosu açıklandı! Girls TV anime dizisi, 2 Nisan 2026'da Japonya'da gösterime girecek....
tamMetin:
A key visual, trailer, and voice cast have been unveiled for the Komekami! Girls TV anime series, which will premiere in Japan on April 2, 2026. The trailer was first released earlier this month.

Mikinori Suzuki is directing the anime series, with Hideki Sonoda (Beyblade Burst series composer) as scriptwriter, U. as character designer, Takahiro Seguchi (Girly Air Force manga artist) as original character designer, and Hikaru Kodama as chief animation director. Daily Planet is in charge of the animation production.

Meanwhile, the anime’s voice cast includes:

Komekami! Girls began in 2011 as a character mascot project for a Fukuoka-based promotional rice packaging campaign. A pilot anime episode was released on the series’ official YouTube channel in 2023.

The series has also inspired several animated shorts, four-panel manga, and light novels.

Sources: Komekami! Girls Official Twitter (2), Official Anime Website, Anime News Network (2)
